articles.title: Federal judge rules DHS illegally stripped immigration status from thousands who entered through CBP
articles.summary: Tuesday's ruling reinstates the immigration status of those who came via CBP One and whose status was terminated.

articles.title: Five Takeaways From the Birthright Citizenship Argument
articles.summary: The justices grappled with questions about domiciles and foundlings, avoided policy debates and mused about the sweep of possible rulings.

articles.title: "Lives will be lost": How the U.K.'s aid cuts may affect parts of Africa
articles.summary: In March, the UK announced it would trim its global aid budget and set new priorities in 2027. This has some countries and organizations worried that on top of the US aid cuts, this could be unsurviva

articles.title: C.D.C. Pauses Testing for Rabies and Pox Viruses
articles.summary: The diseases were removed from a list of tests the agency conducts for state and local health departments. Experts worry that with drastic staff reductions, the testing may not resume.

articles.title: Trump Attends Supreme Court Oral Arguments in a Presidential First
articles.summary: President Trump’s presence in the court puts him face to face with justices whom he has tried to bully and intimidate.

articles.title: Ending Birthright Citizenship Would Disproportionately Affect Asian Legal Immigrants
articles.summary: A new study found that an end to universal birthright citizenship would disproportionately affect babies born to Asian parents.

articles.title: This fringe actor finds the spotlight in Israel's most provocative film post-Oct. 7
articles.summary: Israeli fringe actor in the spotlight for anti-war film

articles.title: How NASA Is Keeping the Astronauts Safe During the Artemis II Mission
articles.summary: Years of testing, emergency systems and sensors have gone into protecting the astronauts set to head to the moon.

articles.title: Trump Administration Scales Back Plan to Dismantle Consumer Protection Bureau
articles.summary: A new filing asks a federal court to allow the White House to dismiss much of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau’s remaining work force, but not close the bureau entirely.

articles.title: Trump to address nation at critical moment in his war with Iran
articles.summary: The address comes after weeks of uncertainty over when and how the U.S. could extricate itself from the conflict.

articles.title: Supreme Court hears challenge to birthright citizenship as Trump attends arguments
articles.summary: A majority of Supreme Court justices peppered Solicitor General D. John Sauer with skeptical questions about the Trump administration's position that birthright citizenship should not apply to babies

articles.title: Trump Says Europe Is On Its Own in Securing the Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Threatening to pull out of NATO, President Trump portrayed the alliance as a “paper tiger” and said Europe was on its own in trying to secure the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: A propaganda war on the National Mall pits Trump against satirical statues and posters
articles.summary: The Trump administration and its critics are waging a war of images on the National Mall like none before. The president's face stares down from federal buildings while statues and posters mock him be

articles.title: After Israel's invasion, many in southern Lebanon worry they'll never go home
articles.summary: Israel says it's creating a "security zone" inside Lebanon, where homes will be demolished, and residents won't be allowed to return home until people in northern Israel feel safe.

articles.title: Placing U.S. Troops in Middle East Hotels May Violate Laws of War
articles.summary: U.S. commanders have kept many troops away from bases in the region to protect them from Iran’s ballistic missile attacks.

articles.title: Greetings from London, where a big COVID memorial holds vigil over the halls of power
articles.summary: Britain's 1,640-foot-long National Covid Memorial Wall stretches along the River Thames, with over a quarter million hearts representing the lives lost during the pandemic — across from Parliament.

articles.title: Israel strikes Lebanon as Trump is set to deliver a speech on the Iran war
articles.summary: As Israel expands its invasion of Lebanon, the White House says President Trump will provide "an important update" to the nation on the Iran war.

articles.title: After years in Russian captivity, former mayor of Ukrainian city returns home
articles.summary: After spending most of the full-scale war in Russian captivity, the former mayor of a frontline Ukrainian city recalls his ordeal as he returns to a hometown deeply transformed by modern warfare.
